result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 13:     AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mo...
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
case_not_transferred AS (
  SELECT c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN case_assignments ca ON ca.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND COALESCE(ca.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS cases_closed
  FROM case_not_transferred
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
),
agent_aht AS (
  SELECT
    cnt.agent_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM agent_case_counts cnt
  JOIN case_not_transferred c ON c.ownerid = cnt.agent_id
  GROUP BY cnt.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM agent_aht
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
case_not_transferred AS (
  SELECT c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN case_assignments ca ON ca.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND COALESCE(ca.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS cases_closed
  FROM case_not_transferred
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
),
agent_aht AS (
  SELECT
    cnt.agent_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM agent_case_counts cnt
  JOIN case_not_transferred c ON c.ownerid = cnt.agent_id
  GROUP BY cnt.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM agent_aht
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
case_not_transferred AS (
  SELECT c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts, c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN case_assignments ca ON ca.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= ((DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')::timestamp)
    AND COALESCE(ca.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS cases_closed
  FROM case_not_transferred
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
),
agent_aht AS (
  SELECT
    cnt.agent_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closed_ts - c.created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM agent_case_counts cnt
  JOIN case_not_transferred c ON c.ownerid = cnt.agent_id
  GROUP BY cnt.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM agent_aht
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
case_not_transferred AS (
  SELECT c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts, c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN case_assignments ca ON ca.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= ((DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')::timestamp)
    AND COALESCE(ca.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS cases_closed
  FROM case_not_transferred
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
),
agent_aht AS (
  SELECT
    cnt.agent_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closed_ts - c.created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM agent_case_counts cnt
  JOIN case_not_transferred c ON c.ownerid = cnt.agent_id
  GROUP BY cnt.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM agent_aht
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
